prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约20393→20760→24323→29415，近3年持续后移，累计后移约9022名；2025年基准约29415名，呈明显竞争加剧趋势；本省 理科/物理类计划2022–2023年均为50人，2024年减至46人，2025年45人；2026年计划49人，较2025年扩招约8.9%，扩招幅度较大，对位次有向下拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第107名（2026年），近年排名在103–109间小幅波动，整体稳定；近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第93、评价 为一般，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未形成显著报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中未收录A-及以上学科数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程、计算机、电子信息等该校招生专业对应大类社会热度为高热推荐/推荐，报考意愿较强；本省2026年物理类考生估算约329239人，较2025年284789人增 长约15.6%，竞争显著加剧；河北工业大学位于天津市，在四川省属跨省招生；该校在四川招生计划占比较小（约45–50人），地 域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类考生大幅增加（+15.6%）、扩招（+8.9%）部分缓解竞争、以及电气/计算机等热门专业的高报考热 度，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧；预测最低位次约31184名，区间30684–31684名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 20393 → 20760 → 24323 → 29415, with a continuous backward shift over the past 3 years, accumulating a backward shift of about 9022 places; the 2025 baseline is about 29415, showing a clear trend of increasing competition; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 50 in both 2022 and 2023, reduced to 46 in 2024, and 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 49, an increase of about 8.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which has a downward pulling effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 107th (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 103 and 109, overall stable; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 93rd, rated as average, short video exposure at a medium-low level, no significant signal of increased application attention; no A- or above discipline data recorded in the fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc., corresponding to the university's enrollment majors, have high social popularity as highly recommended/recommended, with strong application willingness; the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 329,239, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 284,789 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, which is an inter-provincial enrollment in Sichuan Province; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan is relatively small (about 45–50 people), with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, a significant increase in physics category candidates in 2026 (+15.6%), expansion (+8.9%) partially alleviating competition, and the high application enthusiasm for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026 compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31184, with a range of 30684–31684.
